title: Tectaria leprieurii
taxonomy: Tectaria leprieurii is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Tectaria and is classified under the phylum Pteridophyta. Tectaria leprieurii is native to certain regions in Africa, where it grows in tropical forests and woodlands. This fern is characterized by its unique frond structure and is often found growing in shaded areas. The classification of Tectaria leprieurii reflects its evolutionary relationships with other ferns within the kingdom Plantae.
